description: Betfair operates an online betting exchange where customers can view markets and place bets. Its developer program provides APIs for exchange betting, account operations, market/race data, heartbeat/session management, vendor services, and streaming market/order updates.
summary: Betfair exposes authenticated Exchange developer APIs over HTTP/JSON-RPC/REST plus a separate Exchange Streaming API socket protocol documented by an OpenAPI schema.

surfaces.name: Betfair Exchange API (Betting, Accounts, Heartbeat, Race Status, Navigation, Vendor Services HTTP APIs)
